name: Strawberry Smoothie
recipeIngredient: 6 oz. light (reduced sugar) fat-free strawberry, frozen yogurt
4 oz. Crystal Light or other sugar-free lemonade
1 packet Equal sweetener or 2 teaspoons of sugar (if not available)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
Note: This recipe serves 2. Per serving, it contains 0 g fat and approximately 70 calories.
